docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$N/A) SERVED JUL-06-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FECTEAU, HEATHER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-27-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-27-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF NIKOL HOPKINS & DEFENDANT HEATHER FECTEAU. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS RETURNED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,625.00 FILED BY HOPKINS, NIKOL AS TO DEFENDANT FECTEAU, HEATHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2016 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OF DEFENDANT BY DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT FECTEAU, HEATHER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOPKINS, NIKOL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FECTEAU, HEATHER $1,625.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,675.00, DEFENDANT HAS AUTHORIZED THE RELEASE OF HER $800.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT TO THE PLAINTIFF TO BE APPLIED TO THE JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
